plan: <path to the canonical plan.json this register hardens>

scenarios.failure_narrative: <It is <date> and the plan has failed. Past-tense story of the mechanism.>
scenarios.evidence: <cited data when basis=evidence, else empty string>
scenarios.early_warning_signal: <observable leading indicator that fires before the failure>
scenarios.mitigation: <plan delta: task, buffer, or gate to add - or delete this field and set accepted_by>
scenarios.accepted_by: <name of the person explicitly accepting the unmitigated risk - only instead of mitigation>
scenarios.owner: <person accountable for the mitigation or acceptance>
